title: Count distinct with group_by
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.unique_commenters_per_post/0` that returns each post with a count of distinct commenters. Group by post id+title, then select `{p.id, p.title, count(c.user_id, :distinct)}`. Use `count/2` with `:distinct` as the second argument — NOT `count(fragment("DISTINCT ..."))`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Typed `count/2 :distinct` is easy to miss; Claude often reaches for fragment.
